How to write subject lines that get BIG open
rates (and make you a lot of money)
What you want in a subject line (try to hit on as many of these as possible)
Words/numbers that stand out
#1 worst way to make money with Amazon (avoid this)
WW2 vet was on his death-bed...then THIS happened
Provokes a lot of curiosity
71 year-old woman poops out 48 lbs of fat with this “unusual” nutrient
This ad has made me $1k a day for 3 years
Retire rich on just 3 stocks?
Actress reveals the “bathroom trick” that makes her feel years younger
FDA issues dire warning about antacids
This chocolate is 15x healthier than kale
Why did Fox News clear their schedule to put this Doctor on TV?
Send this 3-word text to a man when he pulls away
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

Rat poop found in survival food?
Controversial/Taboo
I POUR hydrogen peroxide on my vagina (here’s why)
Meet your next president: The female Obama
What smelly poop really means
Topical News/People/Celebs
J-Lo booty in 4 weeks?
Melania Trump’s secret for staying slim
“Doomsday Preppers” star says this is the #1 item you should hoard
Trump’s new 5g plan opens the floodgates
Credibility/Proof
UCLA: 9 out of 10 dementia cases reversed with this “cocktail”
Harvard: “avoid tap water” if you live in one of these 37 cities
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

Warren Buffet’s secret “cockroach strategy” for getting rich
Drama/Story
Outraged seniors DEMAND the Coast Guard release new “fountain of
youth” drink
WW2 vet was on his death-bed...then THIS happened
71 year-old woman poops out 48 lbs of fat with this “unusual” nutrient
How many boxes does your subject line check off?
- words/numbers that stand out
- Curiosity provoking
- Controversial or taboo
- Topical news, celebs
- Credibility/proof
- Specific benefits
Two parts we focus on…
- From name
- Subject line
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
